product_overview: A Bronze→Silver→Gold pipeline to ingest regulatory PDFs and web content, produce section-level structured data, generate embeddings, enable FAISS semantic search, and build a YAML-based regulatory knowledge graph for compliance mapping and RAG workflows.
core_goals: Ingest and preserve raw regulatory source artifacts (Bronze) with deterministic metadata and hashing.
Produce deterministic, section-level structured JSON (Silver) with OCR/bilingual handling and minimal interpretation.
Generate high-quality embeddings and semantic labels (Gold) to enable semantic search, RAG and downstream reasoning.
Provide tooling to discover legislation, batch-process manifests, validate data integrity, build a knowledge graph, and scrape authoritative sources.
Expose lightweight HTTP endpoints for orchestration and the web signup flow (noting current FastAPI route stubs).
Ensure observable failure logging and conservative interpretation rules (no hallucinated metadata).

features.name: Document Ingestion Pipeline
features.description: Process a single PDF through the Bronze→Silver→Gold pipeline: store raw artifacts, run OCR when needed, apply extractors (including bilingual column extractor), segment into sections, infer metadata, and emit section-level JSON plus embeddings.
user_flows: POST /ingest with {"pdf_path":"/data/missing.pdf","document_type":"act"} -> Receive 400 Invalid PDF or missing parameters

features.name: Batch Document Processing
features.description: Process multiple documents defined in a YAML manifest with dependency ordering; runs the full pipeline for each manifest entry and returns per-document results.
user_flows: POST /batch-ingest with {"manifest_path":"/manifests/manifest_with_missing_file.yaml"} -> Receive 500 Pipeline processing error

features.name: Legislation Discovery & Mapping
features.description: Discover and download legislation (e.g., from laws-lois.justice.gc.ca) by act name or slug, producing manifest entries ready for ingestion.
user_flows: POST /discover with {"acts":["nonexistent-act"]} -> Receive 404 Act not found

features.name: Semantic Search
features.description: FAISS-powered semantic similarity search over Gold-layer section embeddings to retrieve top-K relevant sections for a natural language query.
user_flows: GET /search with {"query":"customer due diligence AML requirements","top_k":5,"category":"AML"} -> Receive 200 {"results":[{"section_id":"BA-9-1","title":"Customer Due Diligence","body":"...","score":0.92,"document":"bank_act_2025"}]}
GET /search with {"query":"data retention policy","top_k":5} -> Receive 500 Index not loaded

features.name: Knowledge Graph Builder
features.description: Build and maintain a YAML-based regulatory knowledge graph (nodes.yaml, edges.yaml, domains.yaml) from manifest relationships and detected cross-document mappings.
user_flows: POST /build-kg with {"manifest_path":"/manifests/corrupt_manifest.yaml"} -> Receive 500 KG build error

features.name: Data Validation
features.description: Run validation checks on manifest integrity and Bronze/Silver/Gold schema compliance and return errors and warnings for remediation.
user_flows: GET /validate -> Receive 500 Validation service unavailable (backend route stubs)

features.name: Email Signup API
features.description: Public endpoint to submit emails for a waitlist; stores entries in Notion (or configured sink).

features.name: Web Scraping
features.description: Scrape regulatory content from configured sources (FINTRAC, OPC) and convert scraped HTML to PDFs when required for ingestion.

known_limitations.issue: FastAPI routes are empty stubs - no HTTP server is implemented yet
known_limitations.impact: Backend features are only accessible via CLI scripts, not HTTP endpoints

known_limitations.issue: AI reasoning modules are placeholder stubs
known_limitations.impact: No LLM-powered reasoning, agents, or evaluation available yet
All data stored as flat files (JSON, YAML, NumPy) instead of relational DB
All endpoints and scripts are unauthenticated
